title: Digital Consumer Technology Supplier List (2002)
author: Peter S. Kastner
abstract: Aberdeen's four-category taxonomy of the Digital Consumer Technology (DCT) supplier landscape as of early 2002, spanning PCs & peripherals, networks & automation, applications & services, and leisure & entertainment. Catalogs 150+ named suppliers organized by the analytical framework used in Aberdeen's DCT tracking program.
importance_rationale: Snapshot of Aberdeen's DCT universe definition at the program's inception; anchors interpretation of subsequent weekly tracking files.
relevance_rationale: Historical record of the early-2000s consumer-tech vendor landscape; useful reference for studying market consolidation since.
prescience_rationale: Taxonomy document; contains no forward-looking predictions.
